user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship (Souvenirs & Gifts)
fields.description: Flagship department store with a wide selection of Canadian souvenirs, clothing, and gift items. Good one-stop spot to grab gifts before departure — if preferred, Roots (nearby) is an alternative for apparel and branded items.
highlights: Alternative: nearby Roots store for apparel
